regulators.title: Regulators
regulators.subtitle: Look up broker licenses, regulators and risk tier.
regulators.search_placeholder: Search regulator, broker or license number
regulators.tier1_body: Top-tier authorities (FCA, ASIC, etc.) conduct active supervision and offer statutory investor compensation schemes.
regulators.tier2_body: Adequate regulation but typically without statutory compensation; client funds must be segregated at top-rated banks.
regulators.tier3_body: Limited regulatory supervision. Investor recourse is limited. We recommend caution.
regulators.offshore_body: Offshore jurisdictions do not regulate FX trading and offer no investor protection. Most reviewers report withdrawal or bonus-trap complaints.
regulators.warning_offshore: Offshore jurisdictions do not regulate FX trading and offer no investor protection.

write.title: Write a review
write.subtitle: Help thousands of traders choose wisely. Real reviews from real accounts.
write.rating_withdrawal_help: How long did your last withdrawal take?
write.rating_support_help: Responsiveness and helpfulness of customer service
write.title_placeholder: Summarize your experience in one line
write.body_placeholder: Tell other traders what they should know. Be specific.
write.upload_label: Upload screenshot of deposit or withdrawal (optional)
write.upload_help: Reviews with proof are marked "Verified" and ranked higher.
write.email_help: We never publish your email. We use it only to verify this review.
write.submit_help: Reviews are usually published within 24 hours after verification.
write.thanks_title: Thanks — your review is in the queue
write.thanks_body: We'll email you when it's published (usually within 24 hours).
write.honeypot_help: If you're human, leave this blank.

for_brokers.title: Tradervote for brokers
for_brokers.subtitle: Turn your TrustScore into trust. SEO, leads, and a direct reply channel to your critics.
for_brokers.cta_sub: Free to claim. Pro and Enterprise plans unlock replies, insights and SEO widgets.
for_brokers.benefit_reputation_body: Get a verified profile. Reply to reviews. Show the world you're listening.
for_brokers.benefit_seo_body: Tradervote pages rank on Google for high-intent queries like "best broker Thailand".
for_brokers.benefit_insights_body: Aggregated, anonymised sentiment about your platform, support, and pricing.
for_brokers.plan_free_body: Verified profile · basic TrustScore · public reviews
for_brokers.plan_pro_body: Reply to reviews · insights dashboard · SEO widget
for_brokers.plan_enterprise_body: API access · custom reports · multi-account · dedicated CSM

risk.warning_body: 70% of retail investor accounts lose money when trading CFDs. Consider whether you understand how CFDs work and whether you can afford the high risk of losing your money.
